title: mentha × piperita var. hercynica
intro: Mentha × piperita var. hercynica, also known as German peppermint, is a variety of peppermint that is native to Europe and is known for its distinctive flavor and aroma. This plant is valued for its medicinal properties, which include its ability to ease digestive issues, relieve headaches and nausea, and act as an anti-inflammatory agent. The health benefits of German peppermint include reducing stress and anxiety, improving respiratory function, and aiding in the relief of symptoms associated with irritable bowel syndrome. German peppermint is commonly used in herbal preparations such as teas, tinctures, and oils, which can be consumed orally or applied topically to the skin for its medicinal properties.
